svg.text: Orchestrated sequence from intake validation to human-reviewed authorization decision
CPT/HCPCS format checks + required request data presence validation
• Patient demographics and data quality checks
• ICD-10 validation and clinical data extraction
• Structured findings passed to downstream phase
Provider verification • Policy search • Criteria mapping (MET / NOT_MET / INSUFFICIENT)
8-section audit justification document (Markdown + PDF) with source attribution
Human Decision Panel — Accept / Override → Final PDF Outputs
